name: Livermore — Line of Least Resistance
description: Reminiscences-style pivot-point breakout to fresh highs with confirming volume and RS leadership.

rules.name: rs-leader
rules.expr: rs_rating is not None and rs_rating >= 80

rules.name: rs-line-up
rules.expr: rs_line_6m is not None and rs_line_3m >= rs_line_6m

rules.name: not-extended
rules.note: Stand aside if too far above 50MA
